zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomazine Sidney於大約1445年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可福德時，她的父親William Sidney IV30歲，母親Thomasine Barrington31歲。她於1497年與William de Tendring在英國英格蘭素福爾可福德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年10月4日在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可福德。

nameMeanings.name: Sidney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Sidney Farm in Alfold (Surrey), from Old English sīd ‘large, spacious, long’ (dative sīdan) + ēg ‘island’.
possibly also a habitational name from any of the places called Saint-Denis in Normandy, named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Dionysius (see   Dennis  ).

variants.name: Dennis
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Denis(e), Dinis(e), vernacular forms of Latin Dionysius, Greek Dionysios ‘(follower) of Dionysos’, an eastern god introduced to the classical pantheon at a relatively late date and bearing a name of probably Semitic origin. The name was borne by various early Christian saints, including Saint Denis, the martyred 3rd-century bishop of Paris who became the patron saint of France. From the 12th century onward, the popularity of the name in England (and of its cognates, mainly Denis , in the continental Europe) seems to have been largely due to French influence. The feminine form Dionysia (in vernacular English likewise Den(n)is) is also found, and some examples of the surname may originate from it.
English: from Middle English deneis, a variant of danais ‘Danish’, with the vowel influenced by Middle English denshe (Old English denisc). Compare Dence .

Irish (mainly Dublin and Cork): of the same origin as 1 and 2 above, sometimes an alternative form to Donohue but more often to McDonough , since the personal name Donnchadh was Anglicized as Donough or Denis.

variants.name: Sydney
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): variant of   Sidney  .

en.lifeSummary: When Thomazine Sidney was born about 1445, in Yoxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Sidney IV, was 30 and her mother, Thomasine Barrington, was 31. She married William de Tendring in 1497, in Yoxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 4 October 1485, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Yoxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, Unit: Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomazine Sidney est née environ 1445, à Yoxford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Sidney IV, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Thomasine Barrington, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William de Tendring en 1497, à Yoxford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 octobre 1485, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Yoxford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomazine Sidney um 1445 in Yoxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Sidney IV 30 und ihre Mutter Thomasine Barrington 31. Sie hat 1497 in Yoxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom William de Tendring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Oktober 1485 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Yoxford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomazine Sidney è nata il circa 1445 nel Yoxford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Sidney IV, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Thomasine Barrington, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato William de Tendring nel 1497, nel Yoxford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1485, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Yoxford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomazine Sidneyが約1445年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイオクスフォードで生まれた時，父William Sidney IVは30歳，母Thomasine Barringtonは31歳であった。1497年にイギリスイギリススフォルクイオクスフォードでWilliam de Tendringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年10月4日に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクイオクスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, Unit: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomazine Sidney(이)가 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 요스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Sidney IV(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Thomasine Barrington(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 요스퍼드에서 William de Tendring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 10월 4일 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 요스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomazine Sidney nasceu aproximadamente 1445, em Yoxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Sidney IV, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Thomasine Barrington, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Tendring em 1497, em Yoxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1485, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Yoxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, Unit: сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomazine Sidney родилась около 1445 г. в местности ексфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Sidney IV было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Thomasine Barrington, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Tendring в 1497 г. в местности ексфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 4 октября 1485 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности ексфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomazine Sidney nació aproximadamente 1445, en Yoxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Sidney IV, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Thomasine Barrington, tenía 31 años. Se casó con William de Tendring en 1497, en Yoxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1485, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Yoxford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
